chapter_context.summary: The census and specific duties of the Levites (Kohathites, Gershonites, and Merarites) are established.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on The Sons of Aaron (3:1-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Numbering the Levites (3:14-39), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.
This section focuses on Redemption of the Firstborn (3:40-51), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Numbers.

key_themes.title: God's Faithfulness
key_themes.description: God sustaining His people despite their repeated rebellions.

key_themes.title: The Census
key_themes.description: The organization and numbering of the new generation.

devotional.question: How can we learn from Israel's mistakes and choose trust over complaining?
In what ways has God 'cloud and fire' guided your path recently?

cultural_historical.title: The Wilderness Journey
cultural_historical.text: The journey from Sinai to Moab was meant to be brief but became a 40-year period of purification for the nation.
